TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rodrigue_Beaubois, title = Rodrigue_Beaubois, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rodrigue_Beaubois} }

S.FORM: Rodrigue Beaubois hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 2, Rodrigue Beaubois, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Rodrigue Beaubois hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 2, Rodrigue Beaubois, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ro*riɣue βeauβois~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ro*riɣue βeauβois~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
